rationale.hitl-workflow: Empirical study of developer control surfaces, checkpoints, and bounded delegation.
rationale.automation-bias: Investigates vibe coding over-reliance versus active human oversight and control.
rationale.quality-debt: Examines developer enforcement of readability and maintainability to prevent quality decay.
rationale.counterpoint: Opposes vibe-coding automation maximalism, demonstrating experts insist on human control.
